hypothesis: A hybrid encoder-decoder foundation model combining Transformer and Mamba-2 architectures, pre-trained on multiple molecular representation modalities simultaneously, will produce a unified latent space that aligns chemically equivalent molecules across different notations and enables superior performance on molecular property prediction and cross-modal translation tasks compared to single-modality or purely Transformer-based approaches, because joint multimodal pre-training forces the model to learn modality-invariant molecular representations that capture underlying chemical structure more completely than any single notation can.
